description: SPIKE v2: hermetic backstage parallel-line candidate generator. Runs `pi -p` as a detached async actor with `--no-tools` (zero tools) and `--no-approve --no-context-files` (the child does NOT load this project's .pi/settings.json / extension.ts / AGENTS.md). Separate process + zero tools + an own empty session means it physically cannot read or write the GM's canonical state or secrets; its only input is the self-contained safe-projection prompt. The child's transcript is pinned to a DURABLE session dir (`--session-dir` + `--session-id {run_id}`) so the candidate survives the volatile `~/.pi/agent/tmp` run-dir GC: harvest the last assistant message from that session file. Returns a ParallelLineOutput JSON candidate for the main GM to validate and land via record_offscreen_event. Spike artifact — not active GM policy.
